view_mode_notes: Fixed top-down grid of tiles on a portrait canvas. No camera scroll during gameplay. Cocos Creator 3.x Canvas component drives all scaling via SHOW_ALL / FIT_HEIGHT policy.

coordinate_system.origin_notes: Cocos Creator 3.x world-space origin is at Canvas center (anchorPoint 0.5,0.5). Confirmed by Prototype.scene Canvas UITransform._anchorPoint {x:0.5, y:0.5}.
coordinate_system.y_direction_notes: Cocos Creator 3.x uses Y-up in world space. UITransform positions expressed in design-space pixels relative to Canvas center.

tile_size_px.derivation: Board node ContentSize=528x528; 528/8cols=66px per tile (ch1-2 standard 8x8). For 9-col layout: 528/9≈58.7px. Art should target 66px base with 8px gutter.

board_offset_from_center.description: Board node positioned 30px below canvas center to give HUD space at top

grid_dimensions.note: Ch1-2 use 8x8/9x9 rectangular grids; Ch3+ use irregular shaped boards (bay/island outline) where valid cell count is always even. TileGrid.initialize(rows, cols) drives runtime dimensions.

camera.type_notes: Cocos Creator 3.x Canvas-based 2D rendering. No 3D perspective camera; all rendering through the Canvas UITransform stack.
camera.fit_mode_notes: 2d-runtime-profile.json specifies design_scale_policy=SHOW_ALL (fit_height primary). Canvas alignCanvasWithScreen=true. On narrower viewports the canvas letterboxes on sides; on taller viewports it letterboxes top/bottom. This ensures the entire 750x1334 design space is always fully visible.

safe_area_insets.notes: iPhone notch/Dynamic Island top=44px; iPhone home indicator bottom=34px. UI elements (HUD labels, pause button) must not be placed within these insets. Board and game content are safe below y=+623 (667-44) design-space from center-top.

camera_shake.implementation: tween on Canvas or Camera node position, max amplitude 8px, duration ≤0.3s

layers.name: Background
layers.content: Full-bleed island/chapter environment art. One sprite per chapter theme (6 total). Watercolor style background illustration.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Background fills the full 750x1334 canvas. Use Sprite scaleType=SLICED or a single full-bleed texture sized 750x1334 with anchor 0.5,0.5. Must cover canvas entirely with no black borders.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Background fills the entire canvas with no black borders or white gaps at any viewport in the viewport_matrix. Chapter-themed illustration is fully visible and not clipped.

layers.name: IslandDecor
layers.content: Decorative foreground elements: rocks, foliage, NPC ambient sprites, environmental particles (non-gameplay). Positioned in design space relative to canvas center.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Decorative sprites use absolute design-space positions. They scale with the canvas SHOW_ALL transform but have no independent scale logic.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Decorative elements are visible and correctly positioned relative to background. No z-fighting with Background or Board layers.

layers.name: Board
layers.content: TileGrid visual container. Node ContentSize=528x528, positioned at (0, -30) from canvas center. Children are tile view nodes in row-major order (row*cols+col index).
layers.scale_policy_notes: Board node is a fixed-size container; tile cell views are sized to (board_w/cols) x (board_h/rows). Board does not scale independently — it inherits canvas SHOW_ALL. For variable grid sizes, recalculate tile size as 528/cols and 528/rows.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: All active tile cells are visible within the 528x528 board area. No tile clips outside board boundaries. Board is centered horizontally with correct vertical offset (-30px from canvas center).

layers.name: TileConnectLine
layers.content: Path-drawing layer that renders the connection line between matched tile pairs (≤2-turn L/Z path). Rendered as a Graphics or sprite-based line, cleared after match animation completes.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Path coordinates are in board local-space. Convert grid (row,col) to board local-space pixel using: x = (col + 0.5) * tile_w - board_w/2; y = board_h/2 - (row + 0.5) * tile_h.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Connection line is visible over tiles during match animation (0.3s window). Line does not persist after animation completes. Line renders in front of tiles but behind VFX layer.

layers.name: Obstacles
layers.cocos_hierarchy_path: Canvas > Board > Obstacles (child of Board node)
layers.content: Obstacle overlays: ice_block, weed, wooden_crate, water_current visual states. Rendered on top of base tile sprites as sprite overlays per cell.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Obstacle sprites are sized per-tile and inherit Board node transforms. Each obstacle cell overlay is positioned at the same (row,col) as its tile.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Obstacle sprites are fully visible over base tiles. Obstacle hit states (damage cracks, melt layers) are distinguishable at all target viewports.

layers.name: VFX
layers.content: Particle effects and animation overlays: tile disappear burst, combo glow ring, wave special 3x3 area clear, light_chain sweep, cascade chain animation. All VFX are transient and pooled.
layers.scale_policy_notes: VFX nodes spawn at world-space coordinates derived from board tile positions. Use board-to-world coordinate conversion. VFX lifetime ≤1.5s; pool and recycle nodes.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: VFX are visible over gameplay tiles and obstacles. No VFX bleeds over HUD elements. Combo glow ring is visible around matched tiles during combo window.

layers.name: SpecialBlockIndicator
layers.content: Visual badge/indicator rendered on tiles that have specialBlockType set (wave, light_chain, pierce, swap, cascade). Distinct icon badge overlaid on base tile sprite.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Special block badge is sized at ~60% of tile size and positioned at tile center. z_order must be above base tile but below VFX.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Special block indicator icon is clearly readable at tile size (≥66px). Icon does not obscure the base tile type sprite beyond 40% of tile area.

layers.name: GameHUD
layers.content: In-game HUD: ComboLabel (y=+520), ClearedLabel/objectiveCountLabel, objectiveProgressBar, movesLabel, pauseButton, shopButton. All positioned in design-space relative to canvas center.
layers.scale_policy_notes: HUD elements use Cocos Widget component to anchor to canvas edges. Top HUD elements anchor to top edge with safe_area_insets.top (44px) margin. Bottom HUD anchors with bottom safe area (34px). Horizontal centering uses Widget center anchor.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: All HUD labels and buttons are readable and not clipped at any viewport. ComboLabel at y=+520 is within safe area. ResetButton/bottom HUD respects bottom safe area. No HUD element overlaps the board gameplay area (y range -294 to +234 from canvas center with board at y=-30, size 528).

layers.name: NPCDialog
layers.content: NPC speech bubble and character portrait overlay. Appears at level start/end narrative beats and chapter events. Slides in from bottom edge.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Dialog panel anchored to bottom of canvas with safe area margin. Max width 700px, height ~280px. Character portrait sized 160x160px, positioned at bottom-left of dialog panel.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: NPC dialog is fully visible and not clipped. Character portrait is not obscured by system home indicator or notch area. Dialog text is legible at all target viewports.

layers.name: SwapSelectionOverlay
layers.content: Semi-transparent overlay activated when SWAP special tile is triggered. Highlights selectable cells for the 10-second selection window. Deactivates on cell selection or timeout.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Overlay covers entire Board area (528x528 + margin). Alpha = 0.6 darken of non-selectable cells. Active cell highlights use coral_warm (#E8866A) glow ring.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Overlay is visible over the board during swap selection. Non-selectable cells are visually dimmed. Selected cell highlight ring is distinguishable. Overlay does not cover HUD elements.

layers.name: Popups
layers.content: Modal popups: LevelCompletePopup (stars, score, rewards), FailPopup (continue/exit dialog), PauseMenu (settings, quit). Each popup has a dimmed backdrop layer.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Popup panels are center-anchored (0.5, 0.5) with max-width 680px. Backdrop sprite fills full canvas (750x1334) at alpha 0.7. Popups animate in via tween scale 0.8→1.0 + UIOpacity 0→255.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Popup panel is fully visible and centered. Backdrop dims all underlying layers. Popup content (star icons, button labels, reward icons) is not clipped. Close/confirm buttons are within safe area.

layers.name: ToastNotifications
layers.content: Ephemeral toast messages (e.g. '今日禅境次数已用完，明天再来'). Auto-dismiss after 2.5s. Positioned at top-center or bottom-center of safe area.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Toast label node width ≤680px. Bottom toast: y = -580 (above bottom safe area). Top toast: y = +560 (below top safe area). UIOpacity fade-in 0.2s, hold 2s, fade-out 0.3s.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Toast message text is fully visible and legible. Toast does not overlap critical HUD elements (combo label, moves counter). Auto-dismissed within 2.5s.

layers.name: SystemOverlay
layers.content: Highest z-order layer for loading screens, scene transitions (fade black), and error dialogs. Renders above all gameplay and UI content.
layers.scale_policy_notes: Transition fade covers full canvas (750x1334) with a solid color (island_sand #F7EDD8 preferred over black). Loading spinner centered. SceneTransitionManager owns this node.
layers.screenshot_acceptance_criteria: Transition fade covers all underlying layers with no gaps. Loading spinner is centered. Fade-in and fade-out durations ≤0.4s.

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: SHOW_ALL: scale = min(375/750, 667/1334) = min(0.500, 0.500) = 0.500. Perfect fit, no letterbox.
viewport_scale_rules.notes: Minimum supported viewport. Tile size 33px effective — borderline readable. Art should have clear outlines at 32px as per art-style-guide silhouette_language rule.

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: SHOW_ALL: scale = min(390/750, 844/1334) = min(0.520, 0.632) = 0.520. Horizontal fit, vertical letterbox top+bottom.
viewport_scale_rules.notes: Primary target device. 34px effective tile size. Vertical letterbox ~75px each side fills with background color (island_sand #F7EDD8).

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: FIT_HEIGHT: scale = 844/1334 = 0.632. Canvas is 475px wide, 26px left+right clip (design edges not visible).
viewport_scale_rules.notes: FIT_HEIGHT gives larger tiles but clips 26px on each horizontal edge. Safe if UI stays within central 700px of 750px design width. Board (528px wide) is fully visible.

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: SHOW_ALL: scale = min(430/750, 932/1334) = min(0.573, 0.698) = 0.573. Horizontal fit, vertical letterbox.
viewport_scale_rules.notes: Larger phone. 38px effective tile. More pronounced top/bottom letterbox due to tall aspect ratio.

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: SHOW_ALL: scale = min(768/750, 1024/1334) = min(1.024, 0.767) = 0.767. Vertical fit, horizontal letterbox.
viewport_scale_rules.notes: Tablet portrait. 51px effective tile size — comfortable readability. Horizontal letterbox 97px each side. Art assets still display at sub-1x design resolution.

viewport_scale_rules.scale_factor_derivation: SHOW_ALL: scale = min(1280/750, 800/1334) = min(1.707, 0.599) = 0.599. Vertical fit (landscape viewport), heavy horizontal letterbox.
viewport_scale_rules.notes: Desktop landscape preview. Heavy horizontal letterbox. Canvas appears as a tall portrait window centered in browser. This is expected for a portrait mobile game in desktop preview. Background color fills letterbox areas.

grid_to_board_local.formula: x = (col + 0.5) * tile_w - board_w * 0.5;  y = board_h * 0.5 - (row + 0.5) * tile_h
grid_to_board_local.note: Board node anchor is (0.5, 0.5). Row 0 is top of board (highest Y), row N-1 is bottom (lowest Y). Col 0 is left, col N-1 is right.

grid_to_canvas_world.formula: world_x = board_pos_x + local_x;  world_y = board_pos_y + local_y
grid_to_canvas_world.note: Board is positioned at (0, -30) in Canvas local space. VFX and overlay nodes parented to Canvas must add board offset.

coordinate_conversion.cocos_coordinate_note: Cocos Creator 3.x UITransform positions are in parent-local space with Y-up. Do NOT use screen pixels directly. All coordinate math operates in design-space pixels (750x1334 coordinate frame).

layer_sorting_rules.sorting_notes: In Cocos Creator 3.x Canvas 2D rendering, siblings are drawn in order: earlier children are drawn first (lower z). Later children (higher index) overdraw earlier ones. The z_order values in this contract map to sibling order within the Canvas node hierarchy.
layer_sorting_rules.runtime_z_override: Use node.setSiblingIndex() or node.setParent() to dynamically reorder if needed. Avoid cc.Node layer flags for 2D UI — use hierarchy position instead.
layer_sorting_rules.vfx_pooling: VFX nodes must be pooled (NodePool). Spawn to VFX layer, return to pool after animation completes. Never leave orphan VFX nodes in scene.
layer_sorting_rules.popup_backdrop: Popup backdrop must be the first child of the Popup node (z lower than panel), full-canvas sized, alpha ~0.7.

readability_rules.minimum_tile_size_note: Art-style-guide requires tile silhouette to be recognizable at 32x32px. Effective tile size at iPhone SE (375x667) is 33px — at the minimum threshold.
readability_rules.text_minimum_size_note: Minimum font size in design space is 26px (ClearedLabel in Prototype.scene). At scale 0.5 (iPhone SE) this is 13px effective — borderline. HUD label font sizes should not go below 26px design space.
readability_rules.touch_target_note: Apple HIG minimum touch target is 44pt physical = 88px at 2x retina. In design space (750px = 375pt * 2), touch targets must be ≥88px design space for buttons.
readability_rules.tile_touch_target: Tiles at 66px design space = 33px effective on iPhone SE. Input hit area should be padded to 80px design space per tile if grid layout allows.
readability_rules.board_safe_margin_from_hud: Board top edge (y = -30 + 264 = +234 from canvas center) must stay below HUD bottom zone (y = +460 ClearedLabel, y = +520 ComboLabel). Current layout provides ~226px margin between board top and ClearedLabel — adequate.
readability_rules.background_letterbox_color_note: HTML/CSS background color of the web container must be set to #F7EDD8 to avoid black letterbox bars.

production_scenes_inferred: SettingsScene (director.loadScene reference, fallback when SettingsPanel node not found)
scene_list.scene_layer_contract_applies_to: GameScene (primary gameplay). Other scenes follow the same z_order hierarchy but only activate layers relevant to their context.

validation_notes: All 10 visible runtime layers have owner, z_order, scale_policy, and screenshot_acceptance_criteria defined.
Coordinate system confirmed from Prototype.scene (Canvas anchorPoint 0.5,0.5, ContentSize 750x1334, Board node position 0,-30).
Design resolution 750x1334 confirmed from both Prototype.scene and 2d-runtime-profile.json viewport_matrix.design_resolution.
SHOW_ALL fit mode confirmed from 2d-runtime-profile.json design_scale_policy=SHOW_ALL.
Tile size 66px derived from Prototype.scene Board ContentSize 528x528 / 8 cols = 66px.
Safe area insets (top=44, bottom=34) derived from iOS device hardware specifications for notch/home indicator.
TileGrid row-major indexing confirmed from GameScene.ts _getTileNode() implementation.
Viewport scale factors calculated from SHOW_ALL formula: min(viewport_w/750, viewport_h/1334).
Letterbox color #F7EDD8 (island_sand) derived from art-style-guide.json global_palette.
